# Kerygma Social

> One URL. Endless Content.

Kerygma Social is a social media automation platform for small businesses. Drop your website URL and Kerygma Social researches your brand, generates posts for approval, and publishes to LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook.

## What Kerygma Social does

- Crawls your website to learn your brand, industry, and topics
- Generates a balanced mix of SEO, GEO (AI-discoverability), and money (conversion) posts
- Lets you refine captions and images in plain language before publishing
- Connects to LinkedIn, Instagram, and Facebook (more channels coming soon)

One URL. Endless Content.
